Log back in!

Welcome to the FB Careers Center

The Michigan Farm Bureau Family of Companies offers its employees a well-rounded, healthy working environment, including competitive compensation and benefit programs, personal development opportunities, and an onsite fitness center. Consider becoming a part of this Michigan-grown company by completing an online employment application for a position shown below.

 

If you are an Internal Employee please access the "Job Postings Career Center" button from your HRD Barnyard found here. (If you are off site, you will need to login remotely to access the link.)  

 

Join the Farm!

Not ready to apply? Connect with us for general consideration.

Job Listings

You can view all open positions or use the following search form to find jobs that suit your specific career interests.

The system cannot access your location for 1 of 2 reasons:
  1. Permission to access your location has been denied. Please reload the page and allow the browser to access your location information.
  2. Your location information has yet to be received. Please wait a moment then hit [Search] again.
